Name: Fixed condition field
Description: Dropdown field that has multiple values to choose the condition
Dynamic Behavior:
Can have any of the below values
1.Between
2.On
3.Not on
4.After
5.On or after
6.Before
7.On or before
Error State: NA - It will always have a value

Name: Date fields
Description: Calendar field, where user can select a date.
Dynamic Behavior: When user clicks on this field the calendar selection menu would appear which would have the current date selected by default.
Default State: dd/mm/yyyy Will be the default placeholder for this field. When user selects a date it will be shown in this field with the cross icon. If they click the cross icon then the field is reset to its default value
Error State: The field needs to be auto validated for any entry apart from valid dates like how it is done today

Name: Reset link
Description: The tertiary icon , Reset link will reset the conditions configured in all segments to its default value
Dynamic Behavior: Whatever the segment the user is currently in when they click on the reset link it will reset the condition in that segment to its default value

Name: Month field
Description: Dropdown with months, where user can select a month.
Dynamic Behavior:
Can have any of the below values
January
February
March
April
May
June
July
August
September
October
November
December
Error State: NA - It will always have a value

Name: Quarter field
Description: Dropdown field that will have quarter number to choose from
Dynamic Behavior:
Can have any of the below values
Q1
Q2
Q3
Q4
Error State: NA - It will always have a value

Name: Year field
Description: Scrollable-dropdown field that will have year to choose from
Dynamic Behavior:
Can have any of the below values
2019
2020
2021
2022
2023
and so on...
Error State: NA - It will always have a value
